name: Glycerin
description: The gold standard of humectants, heavily relied on for skin hydration.
scientificSummary: Pulls water into the outer layer of your skin from deeper levels of your skin and the air.
mechanismOfAction: Pulls water into the outer layer of your skin from deeper levels of your skin and the air.
